---

## Problem

What user, product, or engineering problem is this solving?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature clearly.

## Scope

- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Checkout / payments
- [ ] Auth / account
- [ ] Admin operations
- [ ] Email / notifications
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler or rejected approaches.

## Additional Context

Add references, screenshots, or examples if needed.
